title: ericoides scoparium
intro: Ericoides scoparium, also known as bearberry or kinnikinnick, is a low-growing evergreen shrub native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include astringent, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The plant is valued for its health benefits, such as treating urinary tract infections, diarrhea, and as a diuretic to help reduce blood pressure. The herbal preparations of bearberry include tea, tinctures, and extracts, which can be used to support urinary health and overall well-being.
